summary: Experienced ICU nurse re-entering after a 2-year hiatus, has childcare needs and her CNA license needs renewal.
work_history: Registered Nurse 2014-2022, ICU at Texas Health, took 2 years for family.

demo_notes: Use to show: high-confidence match (>0.85), CNA->RN progression hint, healthcare resource surfacing.
